title: Turk Talk hybrid natural language processing (NLP) virtual scenario example
content:
# Turk Talk hybrid natural language processing (NLP) virtual scenario example

Authors: Topps, David, Cullen, Michelle
Published: 2019-03-07T19:31:36Z
Subjects: Computer and Information Science, Medicine, Health and Life Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/66HUCD

Example showing the Scenario Director's ability to redirect a User according to their free text input. Human-hybrid NLP.Using Turk Talk approach for Initial Dx and Final Dx. This case can now be made public as a demo. In the 'About' node, we have added some additional instructional materials.

Citation: Topps, David; Cullen, Michelle, 2019, "Turk Talk hybrid natural language processing (NLP) virtual scenario example", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/66HUCD, Harvard Dataverse, V1
